title: GJIE Table Cloths 10Pcs Party Table Covers, 137x274cm Plastic Rectangular Tablecloths for Picnic, Halloween, Christmas, Baby Shower, Graduation, Wedding, Birthday Party (White)
features: [Package Includes] - 137 x 274cm/54" x 108" Rectangular plastic party table cover 10pcs.

[Excellent Material] - Our party tablecloth is made of high quality PEVA, which is environmentally friendly, non-toxic and harmless. Our table cloth is oil-proof, water-proof, dust-proof and it is easy to wipe.
[Save Your Time] - You can clean up messy tables after the party in minutes via disposable plastic tablecloths. So you will have more time to stay with your friends and relatives.

[Perfect Party Supplies] - Disposable tablecloths are good choice for parties: birthday party, baby shower party, anniversary, graduation, bachelor party, bridal shower party, wedding, Halloween party, Easter party, Christmas party, New Years or other occasions.
[Matching Dimensions] - The dimensions of this table covers are fit almost any size table.And they will complement any table and add tasteful and modern color to your meal times.
